summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dark mode contrast fixes across landing page and dashboard. All contrast issues have been successfully resolved with excellent text readability and proper semantic color usage.
passed_tests: Landing Page - Theme toggle functionality working perfectly
Landing Page Dark Mode - Excellent text contrast with rgb(248, 250, 252) on dark backgrounds
Landing Page Dark Mode - Navigation links clearly readable with rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.8)
Landing Page Dark Mode - Service cards with proper dark backgrounds (rgb(15, 23, 41))
Landing Page Dark Mode - CTA buttons maintain good contrast (blue bg, white text)
Landing Page Dark Mode - Header glass effect with dark backdrop rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8)
Dashboard Login Flow - Successfully logged in with test credentials
Dashboard Theme Toggle - Switches smoothly between light and dark modes
Dashboard Dark Mode - Cards with excellent contrast (rgb(29, 40, 58) backgrounds)
Dashboard Dark Mode - Text perfectly readable with rgb(248, 250, 252) on dark surfaces
Dashboard Dark Mode - Page background proper dark theme (rgb(11, 17, 30))
Dashboard Dark Mode - Navigation with good contrast in dark theme
Dashboard Dark Mode - All buttons and interactive elements maintain proper contrast
Semantic Color Implementation - bg-card replaces bg-white for proper dark adaptation
Semantic Color Implementation - text-foreground replaces text-primary for theme-aware text
Glass Effect Enhancement - Dark variant working correctly for header transparency
